codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior blocking issue: `prepare` now skips build only when `tsc` is unavailable and correctly propagates real build failures when `tsc` exists. The new fault-injection test verifies non-zero exit propagation, while the existing no-tsc path tests continue to cover graceful skip behavior.

summary: Reviewed fix feature `distribution-followup-fix-prepare-failure-propagation` against both the original failing diff (`f827ad8`) and fix diff (`e1d22b4`). The original `|| true` masking behavior is removed via `if test -x ...; then npm run build; fi`, and tests now explicitly validate build-failure propagation when `tsc` is present while preserving no-tsc install resilience. No blocking or non-blocking defects found.
